desk_context.committee_budget_comment: Discussed packages should stay within ordinary desk ticket sizes of USD 2.5 million or USD 5.0 million per line. A modest net addition can be considered, but only if current policy checks and client suitability remain clean.
desk_context.risk_comment: Any pre-May worksheet should be reconciled before the recommendation goes to committee.

stale_portfolio_snapshot.comment: Draft worksheet was not reconciled after the latest Asteria bond and portfolio refresh.
